<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Resolve Target Ref<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Resolve the branch/ref a release workflow should operate on, with workflow_dispatch branch validation.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name              | Description                                                 | Required | Default |
|-------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|----------|---------|
| `ref`             | Optional branch/ref input from workflow_dispatch.           | `false`  | ` `     |
| `default-branch`  | Fallback branch when workflow_dispatch does not pass a ref. | `false`  | `main`  |
| `event-name`      | GitHub event name. Defaults to GITHUB_EVENT_NAME.           | `false`  | ` `     |
| `github-ref`      | Full GitHub ref. Defaults to GITHUB_REF.                    | `false`  | ` `     |
| `github-ref-name` | Short GitHub ref name. Defaults to GITHUB_REF_NAME.         | `false`  | ` `     |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name     | Description                               |
|----------|-------------------------------------------|
| `ref`    | Resolved ref to checkout or report.       |
| `branch` | Resolved branch name without refs/heads/. |
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/resolve-target-ref" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Resolve target ref"
   id: "target_ref"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/resolve-target-ref@main"
   with:
    default-branch: "main"
    ref: "${{ inputs.ref || '' }}"
```

<!--/usage-->
